outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed intraday (Positive 0DTE GEX), but elevated systemic risk due to large Negative Monthly GEX.
outlook.summary: Spot is trapped between the 0DTE Magnet (669) and the Gamma Flip (676). While 0DTE flows suggest stability, massive Put Open Interest (660/645) and negative Monthly GEX create a high-risk environment where a breakdown could trigger volatile short-gamma cascades.

levels.motivazione: Massive structural support. Dominant Put OI across all expiries (24k 0DTE, 63k Weekly, 164k Monthly). Primary dealer hedging anchor.
Key resistance cluster. Max Pain for Weekly/Monthly expiries. High Call OI wall creates friction for upside breakouts.
levels.sintesiOperativa: SELL AREA: Max Pain resistance active

levels.motivazione: Intraday pivot point. Separates positive gamma stability (below) from potential negative gamma volatility (above).
Strong magnetic attraction for end of day. Spot is currently drifting towards this level, minimizing option value.
Secondary structural floor. Significant Put OI (23k 0DTE, 62k Weekly, 122k Monthly) indicates extreme tail risk hedging.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed intraday (positive 0DTE GEX) with high structural risk (negative Monthly GEX).
outlook.summary: Market is trapped in a 'Gamma Trap' between 600 Support and 606 Gamma Flip. 0DTE positive GEX suppresses immediate volatility, favoring mean reversion towards Max Pain (600-601). However, heavy Monthly negative GEX and high Put/Call Ratios warn of significant downside risk if support fails. Dealers will sell rallies into resistance.

levels.motivazione: Confluence of Max Pain (0DTE & Monthly) and massive Put OI (92k Monthly). Primary dealer support level.
Dominant Call Open Interest across all expiries (21k 0DTE, 36k Monthly). Major resistance.
Significant Put OI in 0DTE (10k), Weekly (12k), and Monthly (85k). Backup structural support.
0DTE Gamma Flip level. Transition zone from positive to negative gamma. Critical for momentum.
High Call OI concentration (15k 0DTE, 35k Monthly) acting as immediate resistance above spot.
